title: Locked-60 casualty checklist: gunbarrel/legal-screen intro pacing, frame-count menu timers, attract-demo (ramrom) cadence desync
repro: time gunbarrel/legalscreen vs ares oracle; grep menu code for frame-count timers (MENU_LEGALSCREEN_MENU_TIMER_MAX class) and compare durations; verify attract-demo playback timing

history.note: Survey F2. Attract-demo cadence matters doubly: our ramrom replay is itself oracle infra, so a cadence mismatch would silently bias any lane built on it. GoldenRecomp fixes via demoMode + retrace gate (speedgraphframes*2 tick count).
